title: Junior Business Development Manager at Jones Lang LaSalle

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Jones Lang LaSalle
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
